title: Scutellaria scutellarioides
taxonomy: Scutellaria scutellarioides is a member of the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the mint family. This classification is due to its shared characteristics and morphological features with other plants within this family. The genus Scutellaria contains approximately 350 species of flowering plants, with S. scutellarioides being one of them. Scutellaria scutellarioides is native to Southeast Asia and is often found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant's classification has been extensively studied, allowing for its correct placement within the plant kingdom.
